q: Lisa is very stubborn. Nobody ________ change her mind.
a: Lisa is very stubborn. Nobody can change her mind.

q: Ela is very rich. She ________ buy the car she wants.
a: Ela is very rich. She can buy the car she wants.

q: The old man was very poor. He ________ buy anything to eat.
a: The old man was very poor. He couldn't buy anything to eat.

q: There isn't any tea in the fridge. She ________ make tea.
a: There isn't any tea in the fridge. She can't make tea.

q: The kids didn't have a ball. They ________ play basketball.
a: The kids didn't have a ball. They couldn't play basketball.

q: The room was very dark. We ________ see anything.
a: The room was very dark. We couldn't see anything.

q: Tim is very shy. He ________ make friends easily.
a: Tim is very shy. He can't make friends easily.

q: I was very late. I ________ say good-bye to the kids.
a: I was very late. I couldn't say good-bye to the kids.

q: The book was long and boring. She ________ finish it.
a: The book was long and boring. She couldn't finish it.

q: The questions were easy. Everybody ________ solve them easily.
a: The questions were easy. Everybody could solve them easily.

q: I ________ do all the typing at my office.
a: I have to do all the typing at my office.

q: Look at the sign! You ________ smoke in this restaurant.
a: Look at the sign! You mustn't smoke in this restaurant.

q: You ________ come to school on Sundays.
a: You don't have to come to school on Sundays.

q: Zoo notice: Visitors ________ feed this animal.
a: Zoo notice: Visitors mustn't feed this animal.

q: Last week I was ill, so I ________ stay in bed.
a: Last week I was ill, so I had to stay in bed.

q: You ________ whisper, no one can hear us.
a: You don't have to whisper, no one can hear us.

q: Yesterday, I ________ mow the lawn. My brother did it.
a: Yesterday, I didn't have to mow the lawn. My brother did it.

q: You ________ drink this; it is poison.
a: You mustn't drink this; it is poison.

q: Harry, you ________ do your homework now!
a: Harry, you must do your homework now!

q: Notice in a picture gallery: Cameras, sticks and umbrellas ________ be left at the desk.
a: Notice in a picture gallery: Cameras, sticks and umbrellas must be left at the desk.

q: I didn't have enough money and I ________ pay by cheque.
a: I didn't have enough money and I had to pay by cheque.

q: The test was easy. I ________ ask my teacher for help.
a: The test was easy. I didn't have to ask my teacher for help.

q: She felt ill and ________ leave early.
a: She felt ill and had to leave early.

q: You ________ read this book. It's really excellent.
a: You must read this book. It's really excellent.

q: Sorry, I cannot visit you today, I ________ learn for school.
a: Sorry, I cannot visit you today, I have to learn for school.

q: The room is possibly small for your family.
a: The room can be small for your family.

q: It is impossible for him to help you.
a: He can't help you.

q: We were not able to win the football match.
a: We couldn't win the football match.

q: It is certain that they are not actors.
a: They can't be actors.

q: He was able to start working now.
a: He could start working now.

q: It is impossible for the teddy bear to walk.
a: The teddy bear can't walk.

q: He used to be able to climb up the mountain in one hour when he was young.
a: He could climb up the mountain in one hour when he was young.

q: My best friend knows how to play the flute in the band.
a: My best friend can play the flute in the band.

q: She doesn't know how to cook.
a: She can't cook.

q: It was ok for him to jump on the slopes.
a: He could jump on the slopes.
